tweet: Hustle culture is the only path to success. Sleep is for the weak.

results.label: Gemini 2.5 (OR)
results.reply: Your "hustle" isn't ambition. It's a fear of stillness.

results.label: Grok 4 Fast
results.reply: Hustle culture isn't ambition. It's anxiety chasing a finish line that doesn't exist. Rest to run farther.

results.label: DeepSeek V3
results.reply: Hustle culture isn't a path. It's a hamster wheel for people who confuse exhaustion with purpose.

results.label: Llama 3.3 70B
results.reply: Your hustle isn't ambition, it's desperation with a deadline.

results.label: Claude Haiku 3.5
results.reply: Hustle culture is performance art for people too scared to build real systems. Success whispers; desperation screams.

results.label: Claude Sonnet 4.5
results.reply: Your burnout isn't a badge. It's what happens when you mistake motion for progress and call exhaustion commitment.
